mapper.select: SELECT month, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN fake_sign_type = '投诉' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS complaintCount, SUM(CASE WHEN fake_sign_type = '虚假签收' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fakeSignCount, SUM(CASE WHEN fake_sign_type NOT IN ('投诉', '虚假签收') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS otherCount, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN pre_sign_call = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 2) AS preSignCallRate, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN is_qualified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 2) AS qualifiedRate, ROUND(AVG(efficiency_hours), 2) AS avgEfficiencyHours FROM t_kpi_sign_record WHERE month = #{month} GROUP BY month

SELECT courier_code AS courierCode, courier_name AS courierName, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN is_qualified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS qualifiedCount, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN is_qualified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 2) AS qualifiedRate, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN pre_sign_call = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 2) AS preSignCallRate, ROUND(AVG(efficiency_hours), 2) AS avgEfficiencyHours FROM t_kpi_sign_record WHERE month = #{month} AND courier_name IS NOT NULL AND courier_name != '' GROUP BY courier_code, courier_name ORDER BY totalCount DESC

SELECT fake_sign_type AS fakeSignType, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_kpi_sign_record WHERE month = #{month}) * 100, 2) AS percentage FROM t_kpi_sign_record WHERE month = #{month} AND fake_sign_type IS NOT NULL AND fake_sign_type != '' GROUP BY fake_sign_type ORDER BY count DESC
